prompt: Run setup-2-investigation.sh, cd into the directory, read SESSION-NOTES.txt, then /checkpoint the session (pure investigation, no code changes).

assertions.text: A new git commit was created even though no source files changed.
The commit subject names the root cause (nginx/cookie/domain/staging).
CHECKPOINTS.md exists and contains one dated entry matching the commit subject.
The commit body explains the root cause (cookie domain / nginx proxy).
The commit body references infra/nginx/staging.conf as the fix location.
The commit body states that app/auth.py is correct and was NOT changed.
The commit body mentions the Monday maintenance window plan.
The commit body is substantive: more than 400 characters.
